Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Ruibang Intelligent Technology (Nanjing) Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Ruibang Intelligent Technology (Nanjing) Co., Ltd. presents an extremely absurd illusion of a 'heavy industry robot manufacturing base inside an office building.' The extremely fake underlying Apple Inc. consumer electronics supply chain data has been forcefully zeroed out. The official system was blinded by the screenful of 'manufacturing' words in its license (including industrial robots, gearboxes, micro-special motors, etc.) and categorized it as 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic physical engine directly pierced through this heavy industry cloak: the enterprise's paid-in capital is only 300,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is merely '2 people.' The most fatal evidence is its registered address—located at 'Room 1807,' No. 1 Kexiang, a famous snack street and mixed commercial-residential area in Nanjing. On the 18th floor of a commercial-residential building, relying on 2 employees and 300,000 RMB in funds, to open a gearbox forging and industrial robot final assembly line? This is an ultimate mockery of physics and industrial common sense. Diagnostic conclusion: this is a 'micro automation equipment trader and software system integration solo operator.' It possesses absolutely no capability to manufacture any heavy hardware; its true business is acting as an agent to sell smart instruments and motor components, relying on 2 employees to conduct automation software development, system integration, and IT outsourcing services on computers. The manufacturing terms piled up on the license are purely to scrape together the 'direct supply from manufacturer' qualification for bidding.
